awareness.title: Stage 1: Awareness
awareness.headline: Become Visible to the Right Buyers

fabs.advantage: Places your business across the discovery surfaces where buyers are already looking.
fabs.benefit: Becomes visible and relevant before a conversation ever becomes urgent.

fabs.advantage: Helps buyers name the problem with useful, accessible insights rather than noise.
fabs.benefit: Builds early trust so your business is the first point of reference.

fabs.advantage: Routes early attention from social and offline touchpoints to purposeful next steps.
fabs.benefit: Captures useful first-party signals without creating friction.

consideration.title: Stage 2: Consideration
consideration.headline: Make the Problem Easier to Evaluate

fabs.advantage: Provides proof, framing, and examples that help buyers understand fit — not just browse.
fabs.benefit: Moves beyond a static brochure to a genuine decision-support environment.

fabs.advantage: Delivers relevant, helpful messages that continue the conversation without pressure.
fabs.benefit: Keeps your solution present during complex evaluation without forcing a sales conversation.

fabs.advantage: Systematically validates your expertise with proof aligned to the buyer's concerns.
fabs.benefit: Reduces buyer uncertainty and establishes authority early.

decision.title: Stage 3: Decision
decision.headline: Remove the Risk to Move Forward

fabs.advantage: Provides trust signals, FAQs, and proof relevant to the buyer's specific concerns.
fabs.benefit: Lets a buyer validate fit without unnecessary back-and-forth.

fabs.advantage: Handles concerns consistently, not just when a strong seller happens to be involved.
fabs.benefit: Reduces decision risk through clarity rather than increasing pressure.

fabs.advantage: Creates clear next steps that protect both sides from a poor fit.
fabs.benefit: Makes it safe and straightforward for the right buyer to move forward.

conversion.title: Stage 4: Conversion
conversion.headline: Turn Commitment Into a Clean Start

fabs.advantage: Simplifies quote-to-cash so the moment of commitment feels smooth and professional.
fabs.benefit: Eliminates unnecessary admin at the point of agreement.

fabs.advantage: Defines who owns the relationship after the sale so context is never lost.
fabs.benefit: Preserves momentum from pre-sale through onboarding without a confusing handoff.

fabs.advantage: Moves from agreement to action with steps that keep the buyer's context intact.
fabs.benefit: Ensures a good decision becomes a good experience from day one.

fabs.advantage: Surfaces adoption gaps and drift before they become churn stories.
fabs.benefit: Protects value realization so the promise of the left side is confirmed.

fabs.advantage: Creates structured plays for accounts that need attention or are approaching renewal.
fabs.benefit: Manages retention intentionally, not just reactively.

fabs.advantage: Identifies expansion opportunities rooted in real value, not forced upsell pressure.
fabs.benefit: Turns satisfied customers into a future source of trust and referral.
